(3) STAT-POT NAMING IS BUILD-DEPENDENT: this X1.5 build uses VANILLA 'Potion of Defense consumed. 19 left to max.' / 'Potion of Attack consumed. 33 left to max.' (NOT the fruit names 'Defense Coconut/Attack Blackberry' seen on the other build disc_iBUg7V_Eq0A) — so the fruit-named stat-pots are a specific build's flavor, while other builds keep vanilla 'Potion of X'. All builds use the 'N left/more to max' stat-cap counter. (4) MOTD 'Welcome to Revenge of the Fallen'; controls WASDQE; client X1.5.
uncertain: Boss attacks/HP/drops not isolated. The fruit-vs-vanilla pot-name split is now clearly BUILD-DEPENDENT (correcting the earlier assumption that HP/MP=Potion & others=fruit universally). ~36 entries not individually named.
